chapter: JEFP109 – The Book That Saved the Earth
title: The Book That Saved the Earth – Easy VSAQ

questions.question: Who is the author of the play 'The Book That Saved the Earth'?
questions.answer: Claire Boiko.

questions.question: In which century is the play set?
questions.answer: The play is set in the twenty-fifth century.

questions.question: Who introduces the story to the audience?
questions.answer: The Historian introduces the story.

questions.question: What was the twentieth century called?
questions.answer: The twentieth century was called the ‘Era of the Book’.

questions.question: Who is the ruler of Mars?
questions.answer: Think-Tank is the ruler of Mars.

questions.question: Who is Think-Tank’s apprentice?
questions.answer: Noodle is Think-Tank’s apprentice.

questions.question: Where do the Martians land on Earth?
questions.answer: They land in a public library.

questions.question: What do the Martians mistake books for?
questions.answer: They mistake books for sandwiches.

questions.question: Who leads the Martian mission on Earth?
questions.answer: Captain Omega leads the Martian mission.

questions.question: Which book confuses the Martians the most?
questions.answer: Mother Goose confuses the Martians the most.

questions.question: What do the Martians think nursery rhymes describe?
questions.answer: They think the rhymes describe dangerous powers and weapons.

questions.question: Which animal is believed to jump over the moon?
questions.answer: The cow is believed to jump over the moon.

questions.question: Which rhyme frightens Think-Tank the most?
questions.answer: The Humpty Dumpty rhyme frightens Think-Tank.

questions.question: Why does Think-Tank panic?
questions.answer: He believes the Earthlings plan to attack Mars.

questions.question: What decision does Think-Tank take about Earth?
questions.answer: He cancels the invasion of Earth.

questions.question: Where do the Martians flee after cancelling the invasion?
questions.answer: They flee towards Alpha Centauri.

questions.question: Who later becomes the leader of Mars?
questions.answer: Noodle later becomes the leader of Mars.

questions.question: What do Earthlings teach the Martians later?
questions.answer: Earthlings teach the Martians how to read.

questions.question: Which book do Martians still fear?
questions.answer: They still fear the book Mother Goose.

questions.question: What genre does the play belong to?
questions.answer: It is a science fiction comedy.

questions.question: What saves the Earth from invasion?
questions.answer: Books save the Earth from invasion.

questions.question: What quality of Think-Tank causes his failure?
questions.answer: His arrogance causes his failure.

questions.question: What literary device creates humour in the play?
questions.answer: Irony creates humour in the play.

questions.question: What does the play highlight the power of?
questions.answer: The play highlights the power of knowledge.

questions.question: What is the main message of the play?
questions.answer: Knowledge and books are more powerful than weapons.
